meta.attribution: Product data attributed to Product Hunt.
meta.commercialUsage: Product Hunt API must not be used for commercial purposes without Product Hunt approval.

issues.title: 产品灵感日报 · 20 个新品

products.name: Upstream
products.tagline: The inbox designed for humans and agents
products.summaryZh: 为人类与智能体设计的收件箱
products.descriptionZh: 终于，一个让你期待打开的收件箱。智能代理为你整理消息、草拟回复、默默处理琐碎事务，而这一切都发生在一个精心打造的客户端中，让邮件变得轻盈、快速、有趣。
products.description: Finally, an inbox you'll look forward to. Agents sort your messages, draft your replies, and clear the grunt work behind the scenes, all in a client so well-crafted that email feels light, fast, fun.

products.name: Honestly
products.tagline: See what Reddit and TikTok honestly think about your product
products.summaryZh: 看看Reddit和TikTok上对你产品的真实评价
products.descriptionZh: 随着机器人和AI代理充斥互联网，寻找真实的客户意见变得越来越困难。Honestly通过发现Reddit、TikTok、X、YouTube、Instagram和Facebook上关于你产品的经过验证的对话，并将其转化为团队可执行的洞察，从而在混乱中厘清真相。
products.description: As bots and AI agents overrun the internet, finding real customer opinions is only getting harder. Honestly cuts through the chaos by discovering verified conversations about your product across Reddit, TikTok, X, YouTube, Instagram, & Facebook then turning them into insights your team can act on.

products.name: Jesse
products.tagline: Stop building Apollo/Clay lists. Search the live internet.
products.summaryZh: 停止构建Apollo/Clay列表。搜索实时互联网。
products.descriptionZh: 销售团队被过时的数据库困扰了15年。Jesse彻底改变了这一切——这是首个为销售与营销打造的互联网级搜索引擎。只需用自然语言提问："寻找中西部新开业、需要草坪解决方案的足球场馆。"Jesse便会扫描实时网络，找到当下市场中真正的买家。我们是一家反数据库公司，不抓取、存储陈旧数据并高价出售。每条线索都从实时互联网新鲜获取并交付。
products.description: Sales teams have been stuck with stale databases for 15 years. Jesse changes everything.. the first internet-wide search engine built for sales & marketing. Ask in plain English: "Find newly opened soccer facilities in the Midwest needing turf solutions." Jesse scans the live web and finds the right buyers in the market today. We are an anti database company, we don’t scrape and store stale databases and sell them at premium. Every lead is found fresh from the live internet and delivered.

products.name: Tabstack Dev Tools
products.tagline: Ditch your scraper. Make one API call with any tool.
products.summaryZh: 扔掉你的爬虫。用任意工具一次API调用即可完成。
products.descriptionZh: 扔掉你的爬虫。一个API就能让你的代码从网络上获取所需的一切：结构化JSON、干净的Markdown、带引用的研究资料，以及浏览器自动化。无需你自行运行浏览器、大语言模型或处理流程。通过你已有的工具使用它：MCP服务器、命令行、Raycast扩展，或作为Agent技能。获取密钥，三分钟内即可完成首次调用。由Mozilla支持。你的数据永远不会被出售，也永远不会用于训练。
products.description: Ditch your scraper. One API gives your code everything it needs from the web: structured JSON, clean markdown, cited research, and browser automation. No browser, LLM, or pipeline for you to run. Use it from the tools you already work in: an MCP server, CLI, Raycast extension, or as an Agent Skill. Grab a key and make your first call in less than three minutes. Mozilla-backed. Your data is never sold, never trained on.

products.name: Elvin
products.tagline: Proactive AI that finds and finishes work before you ask
products.summaryZh: 主动式AI，能在你提出需求前发现并完成工作。
products.descriptionZh: 停止充当AI与你的实际工作之间的路由层。Elvin是主动式AI，能在你的工具间发现协作任务，处理混乱的多步骤环节，并在执行前征求许可。它将来自消息、会议、文档和任务工具中的零散信息，转化为可直接审批的草稿、跟进事项、更新内容和后续步骤。
products.description: Stop acting as the routing layer between AI and your actual work. Elvin is proactive AI that finds coordination work across your tools, handles the messy multi-step parts, and asks before taking action. It turns scattered context from messages, meetings, docs, and task tools into ready-to-approve drafts, follow-ups, updates, and next steps.

products.name: Viktor for Microsoft Teams
products.tagline: The most powerful AI employee, now in Microsoft Teams
products.summaryZh: 最强大的AI员工，现已入驻Microsoft Teams
products.descriptionZh: 一个驻留在Microsoft Teams中的自主AI员工，可在3000多种工具中执行实际工作：报告、对账、审批、重复性运营。它不是那种起草后等待确认的副驾驶，而是直接交付成果。今日上线，赠送100美元额度，无需绑定银行卡。
products.description: An autonomous AI employee that lives in Microsoft Teams and does real work across 3,000+ tools: reports, reconciliations, approvals, recurring ops. Not a copilot that drafts and waits. It ships. Live today, $100 in credits, no card.

products.name: Agentic videos by D-ID
products.tagline: Interactive videos that talk back
products.summaryZh: 会回应的互动视频
products.descriptionZh: 将任何视频转变为互动式AI体验。借助Agentic Videos，观众不再只是观看——他们可以暂停、提问、获取实时答案，并在视频内部与演示者互动。观众以完全个性化的方式体验内容。创作者则能深入了解知识缺口和意图：一位提出三个问题的观众，比一千次被动完成所传达的信息更多。现已在D-ID平台上线，采用业界领先的表情化虚拟形象构建。
products.description: Turn any video into an interactive AI experience. With Agentic Videos, viewers don't just watch - they pause, ask questions, get real-time answers, and interact with the presenter inside the video itself. Viewers experience content in a fully personalized way. Creators gain a new world of insight into knowledge gaps and intent: a viewer who asks three questions tells you more than a thousand passive completions ever could. Now on the D-ID platform, built with industry-leading expressive avatars.

products.name: VoiceOS
products.tagline: Say it and it's done. JARVIS for your computer
products.summaryZh: 说出来，就完成了。你的电脑版JARVIS。
products.descriptionZh: VoiceOS 是您电脑上通用的语音转操作工具。它消除了在应用间频繁切换的麻烦，最大程度提升专注力与生产力。只需自然说话，VoiceOS 即可立即执行工作流程，同时通过快速确认步骤让您始终掌控操作。支持 Mac 和 Windows 系统全局使用。
products.description: VoiceOS is the universal voice → action for your computer. Eliminates app-hopping, maximizes focus and productivity. Speak naturally, and VoiceOS instantly executes workflows while keeping you in control with a quick confirmation step. Works system-wide on Mac and Windows.

products.name: Juno
products.tagline: Free, local AI powered Voice to Text w/ live transcriptions
products.summaryZh: 免费、本地AI驱动的语音转文字，支持实时转录。
products.descriptionZh: Juno 是一款适用于 Mac 的本地开源语音写作应用，也是唯一支持实时转录的语音听写工具。你可以在 Mail、Slack、Notes、Cursor 或正在使用的应用中自然说话；Juno 能写出干净的文本、重写选中的段落、使用片段，并创建笔记、提醒和闹钟。无需登录，离线运行，永久免费。
products.description: Juno is a local, open-source voice writing app for Mac. It is the only voice dictation tool with live transcriptions. Speak naturally in Mail, Slack, Notes, Cursor, or the app you’re already using; Juno writes clean text, rewrites selected passages, uses snippets, and creates Notes, Reminders, and Alarms. No login, runs offline and free forever.

products.name: Retool
products.tagline: Build anywhere. Govern in Retool.
products.summaryZh: 随处构建。在 Retool 中治理。
products.descriptionZh: 描述你的需求，即可获得一个可直接上线的应用，而非原型。你可以原生构建，或引入在其他地方通过“氛围编码”开发的应用，然后部署到 Retool，自动继承身份验证、审计日志等功能。随处构建，统一管控。
products.description: Describe what you want and get a production-ready app, not a prototype. Build natively or bring in apps that you've vibe coded elsewhere, then deploy into Retool to inherit auth, audit logs, and more automatically. Build from anywhere, govern in one place.

products.name: Otty
products.tagline: A Mac native and beautiful terminal emulator
products.summaryZh: 一款Mac原生且美观的终端模拟器
products.descriptionZh: Otty 是一款原生、GPU 加速的终端，专为在意每一次按键手感的人设计——简洁、快速、美观。这是一款值得单独使用的终端。当你同时运行多个代码代理（如 Claude Code 或 Codex）时，Otty 能保持界面清晰稳定——为你已有的代理而优化。追求优化，而非复杂。
products.description: Otty is a native, GPU-accelerated terminal, designed for anyone who cares about the feel of every keystroke — minimal, fast, and beautiful. A terminal worth using on its own. And when you run several code agents like Claude Code or Codex side by side, Otty keeps it calm and clear — tuned for the agents you already run. Optimization, not complexity.

products.name: Buddy
products.tagline: Free Figma agent + Import anything to Figma
products.summaryZh: 免费Figma代理 + 将任何内容导入Figma
products.descriptionZh: Buddy 是 Figma 内部最强大的 AI 设计代理。如果你已为 ChatGPT 付费，直接接入即可免费对话，无需 AI 点数。在画布上生成界面、流程和变体。克隆任意网站、导入 Claude 设计/工件，或拖入截图即可获得可编辑的 Figma 图层。同时运行并行代理，整理文件，并保持设计系统的一致性。你已在为 AI 付费，现在直接在 Figma 中使用它。
products.description: Buddy is the most powerful AI design agent inside Figma. And if you already pay for ChatGPT, plug it in and chat for free. No AI credits. Generate screens, flows, and variants on your canvas. Clone any website, import Claude design/artifacts, or drop a screenshot to get editable Figma layers. Run parallel agents at the same time, organize your file, and stay on-brand with your design system. You're already paying for AI. Now use it right inside Figma.

products.name: Adapt
products.tagline: The AI company brain that does work for you
products.summaryZh: 为你工作的AI公司大脑
products.descriptionZh: 将Slack转变为拥有共享企业大脑的AI工作空间。一次设置，连接所有工具，任何人都可以@Adapt来回答问题、构建应用并完成工作。
products.description: Transform your Slack into an AI workspace with a shared company brain. Set it up once, connect to every tool, and anyone can tag @Adapt to answer questions, build apps, and get work done.

products.name: Ploy.ai
products.tagline: Ploy turns your website into your company's growth engine.
products.summaryZh: Ploy 将你的网站转化为公司的增长引擎。
products.descriptionZh: Ploy是一个代理式营销平台，从你的网站开始，赋能所有数字渠道。它能自动抓取你的网站、设计页面、运行广告活动、个性化内容，并持续在后台将数据同步回你的CRM。与之前的其他网站构建器不同，它能在你睡觉时努力提升流量并产生成果。
products.description: Ploy is an agentic marketing platform that powers all your digital channels, starting with your website. It slurps your site, designs pages, runs ad campaigns, personalizes content, and syncs data back to your CRM, continuously and in the background. Unlike other website builders before it, it can work to improve your traffic and generate outcomes while you sleep.

products.name: Cliptop
products.tagline: Clipboard history for Mac, right under the notch.
products.summaryZh: Mac 剪贴板历史，就在刘海下方。
products.descriptionZh: Cliptop 是一款快速、本地优先的 Mac 剪贴板管理工具。可从刘海或菜单栏打开，搜索最近复制的内容，预览文本、链接、代码、图片、文件和颜色，将重要项目保存到 Pinboards，并在不失去焦点的情况下粘贴回去。
products.description: Cliptop is a fast, local-first clipboard manager for Mac. Open it from the notch or menu bar, search recent copies, preview text, links, code, images, files, and colors, save key items to Pinboards, and paste back without losing focus.

products.name: Locofy: design-to-code agents
products.tagline: Agentic frontend layer between Figma and Cursor & Claude
products.summaryZh: Figma 与 Cursor 及 Claude 之间的智能前端代理层
products.descriptionZh: Locofy 是连接 Figma 与 Cursor 及 Claude 的智能前端层。通过将专有的设计感知模型与大型语言模型相结合，Locofy 可将 Figma 设计转化为结构清晰、响应式且像素级精准的前端代码，并可直接在 CLI、Cursor、Claude Code 等环境中运行。尽管编码代理在逻辑处理和迭代方面表现出色，但在 UI 精度和 Figma 结构处理上仍存在不足——Locofy 为它们提供了可依赖的前端基础。
products.description: Locofy is the agentic frontend layer between Figma and Cursor & Claude. Using proprietary design-aware models combined with LLMs, Locofy converts Figma designs into structured, responsive, pixel-perfect frontend code and works directly from the CLI, Cursor, Claude Code, and others. While coding agents excel at logic and iteration, they still struggle with UI precision and Figma structure — Locofy provides the frontend foundation they can reliably build on.

products.name: Genie Mentions
products.tagline: AI that gets you *and* the people in your life, together
products.summaryZh: 懂你，也懂你身边的人，让彼此更近。
products.descriptionZh: Genie 的构建基于一个信念：要真正"懂"你，一个有意义的社交产品也必须"懂"你身边的人。推出 Genie Mentions：这是第一款将你的社交圈视为你自身一部分的 AI。你的品味。你朋友的品味。你们共同的兴趣所在。Genie 会持续更新你朋友的重要动向、他们正在进行的旅行、以及他们正在编织的梦想。如果你需要工作用的 AI，ChatGPT 在等着你。如果你想知道你的世界里正在发生什么，@Genie 进来。
products.description: Genie was built on the belief that to truly "get" you, a meaningful social product must also "get" the people in your life. introducing Genie Mentions: the first AI that treats your circle as part of who you are. your taste. your friends' taste. what you're all into. Genie keeps you updated on big moves your friends are making, trips they’re taking, dreams they’re conjuring. if you want AI for work, ChatGPT awaits you. if you want to know what's going on in your world, tag Genie in.

products.name: Labs AI
products.tagline: Turn any text into natural AI voiceovers on iPhone
products.summaryZh: 在iPhone上将任意文字转为自然的AI配音。
products.descriptionZh: Labs AI 是在 iPhone 上制作专业配音的最快方式。由 ElevenLabs 提供技术支持：100 多种 AI 语音、50 多种语言、语音克隆。适用于 YouTube、TikTok、播客、在线教育或任何需要音频的内容。撰写脚本、选择语音、导出。全程不超过 5 分钟。专为移动端打造。无需录音室，无需麦克风。App Store 免费下载。
products.description: Labs AI is the fastest way to create professional voiceovers on iPhone. Powered by ElevenLabs: 100+ AI voices, 50+ languages, voice cloning. Use it for YouTube, TikTok, podcasts, e-learning, or any content that needs audio. Write your script, pick a voice, export. Under 5 minutes. Built mobile-first. No studio. No microphone. Free on the App Store.

products.name: Speed Reader
products.tagline: Read 2–5x faster with zero effort
products.summaryZh: 零费力，阅读速度提升2–5倍
products.descriptionZh: Speed Reader — 一款macOS应用，通过RSVP（逐词显示，无需眼球移动）帮助你将阅读速度提升2–5倍。支持PDF、EPUB、DOCX、网页链接，甚至屏幕截图配合OCR识别。提供4种显示模式，包括MacBook刘海屏小组件。
products.description: Speed Reader — macOS app that helps you read 2–5x faster using RSVP (one word at a time, no eye movement). Supports PDF, EPUB, DOCX, URLs, and even screen capture with OCR. 4 display modes including a MacBook notch widget.

products.name: Tiles: Map Your Adventures
products.tagline: Turn Apple Health workouts into a private route map
products.summaryZh: 将 Apple 健康中的体能训练转化为私人路线地图
products.descriptionZh: Tiles 将 Apple 健康中的锻炼数据、GPX、FIT、CSV 以及照片整合为一张本地优先的私密探索地图。查看你散步、跑步、远足、骑行和旅行所到过的所有地方，发现尚未探索的空白区域，无需创建账户即可分享里程碑。
products.description: Tiles turns Apple Health workouts, GPX, FIT, CSV, and photos into one local-first private exploration map. See everywhere your walks, runs, hikes, rides, and trips have taken you, spot the gaps you have not explored yet, and share milestones without creating an account.
